caption: The video captures a scene on a soccer field, likely during a training session or pre-game warm-up. A goalkeeper, dressed in a blue jersey and black shorts with gloves, is seen standing near the corner flag, possibly preparing to take a corner kick. He appears focused and ready, adjusting his gloves as he looks towards the field. In the background, another individual, possibly a coach or team staff member, stands near the goalpost, observing the scene. The stadium seats are empty, suggesting this might be a practice session rather than a match. The atmosphere is calm and professional, with the players and staff engaged in their respective roles.
